title: Dielectric Immersion Cooling of Li-ion Battery Modules Under Fast Charging
summary: A COMSOL multiphysics study of single-phase dielectric fluid immersion cooling for a 12-cell NMC battery module under 1C-5C fast charging, evaluating thermal runaway risk and cell-to-cell temperature non-uniformity.
image_alt: Simulation of dielectric fluid immersion cooling for a lithium-ion battery module
